---
title: "Edward Charles Lethbridge Walter"
---

## Edward Charles Lethbridge Walter

**Dates:** (Bishopstoke Hants. 1854-5 May 1885 Alderney)

### Description

half-brother of Gertrude Walter and of Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

He was gazetted to the 83rd Foot Regiment in 1875.  He married Mabel Blanche Waller in July 1884.  His death from an accident was reported in the <i>Ipswich Journal</i> 14 May 1885.  He left a baby son, Edward Walter.

### Letters

- Letter from May 10th [1885]
- Letter from Decr 8th [1883]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
